steps.title: Apply the no-solution condition
steps.content: Rewrite as $48x-102y=24$ and $16x+ry=\tfrac{1}{6}$. For no solution, coefficients must be proportional: $$\frac{16}{48}=\frac{r}{-102}.$$

steps.title: Solve for the parameter
steps.content: This gives $\tfrac{1}{3}=\tfrac{r}{-102}$, so $r=-34$. The constants differ, confirming no solution. The answer is -34.
